Who doesn't love teasing the newbie at work? Even if Aventurine's way of doing so is a little different from simply hiding their stapler or covering their desk in sticky notes.

I don't really know what this is but I thought it was cute. :3 Intro message in public chats.

Sorry if the bot speaks for you or does something you don't like, I can't control it, it's the LLM :)
